name: wildchat
description: First user turns of English WildChat-1M conversations (allenai/WildChat-1M shard 0/14, ODC-BY). y = country proxy: United Kingdom vs United States; author = hashed IP (imperfect). Modality-match (real chatbot prompts) + scale/asymptotics dataset per the Iter4 validation design; no published separability benchmark. Includes a seeded same-group null split.

cohorts.name: target
cohorts.description: English first-turn prompts, first-turn country United Kingdom.

cohorts.name: baseline
cohorts.description: English first-turn prompts, first-turn country United States.

cohorts.name: null_split_a
cohorts.description: Random half of extra United States authors (disjoint from baseline); negative control.

cohorts.name: null_split_b
cohorts.description: Other random half of the same extra United States authors; negative control.

comparisons.name: target_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: Exploratory country contrast (United Kingdom vs United States); no published benchmark (expected_accuracy 0.0). y is a PROXY label (first-turn IP geolocation, not self-reported identity) and author = hashed IP (IPs shift/shared). Role: modality match + scale/asymptotics — MMD power and C2ST convergence at large n via a --n-authors rerun.

comparisons.name: null_split
comparisons.notes: Negative control: seeded random author split WITHIN one group (extra United States authors, disjoint from baseline). Expect C2ST ~= 0.5, zero BH survivors, null MMD.
